authors.author: Andraé Crouch
Andraé Crouch
Bald schon kann es sein (dass wir Gott als König sehn)

verse.name: v1
verse.lines: Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King, Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King. Soon and very soon, We are going to see the King, Hallelujah, hallelujah, We are going to see the King.

verse.name: v2
verse.lines: No more crying there, We are going to see the King, No more crying there, We are going to see the King. No more crying there, We are going to see the King, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, We are going to see the King.

verse.name: v3
verse.lines: No more dying there, We are going to see the King, No more dying there, We are going to see the King. No more dying there, We are going to see the King, Hallelujah, Hallelujah, We are going to see the King.
